tool_input.summary: For Mercury dayside ring-current morphology studies, the most relevant PDS holdings are MESSENGER magnetometer (MAG) magnetic-field time series (raw and calibrated), optionally with KT17 internal-field model residual products to isolate external currents, plus MESSENGER EPPS/FIPS and EPPS/EPS plasma/energetic-particle data to relate current systems to plasma pressure and populations. SPICE kernels are needed for geometry (MSO/MBF coordinates, local time, position vs magnetopause).

candidates.title: MESSENGER MAG Calibrated Data Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Primary magnetic-field dataset for characterizing dayside current systems (field depressions/enhancements, boundary crossings) in Mercury Solar Orbital (MSO) and other coordinate products.

candidates.title: MESS E V H SW MAG 3 CDR CALIBRATED V1.0
candidates.reasoning: PDS3 calibrated MAG archive (CDR) corresponding to MESSENGER magnetometer observations; useful if you need the legacy PDS3 formatting/version of the magnetic-field time series.

candidates.title: MESSENGER MAG Raw Data Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Raw MAG measurements if you want to apply custom calibration/filtering choices before deriving dayside ring-current morphology proxies.

candidates.title: MESS E V H SW MAG 2 EDR RAWDATA V1.0
candidates.reasoning: Legacy PDS3 raw MAG (EDR) counterpart to the PDS4 raw bundle; supports custom reprocessing workflows.

candidates.title: MESSENGER Magnetometer KT17 Model Residuals Data Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Provides MAG data with KT17 internal-field model removed (residuals), which helps isolate external current signatures (e.g., dayside ring/current-sheet contributions) from Mercury’s internal dipole field.

candidates.title: MESSENGER EPPS Calibrated FIPS Data Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Ion plasma observations (FIPS) to relate inferred ring-current morphology to plasma populations/pressure on the dayside magnetosphere.

candidates.title: MESS E V H SW EPPS 3 FIPS CDR V1.0
candidates.reasoning: Legacy PDS3 calibrated FIPS plasma data (CDR) corresponding to the PDS4 EPPS/FIPS calibrated bundle.

candidates.title: MESSENGER EPPS FIPS Derived Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Derived FIPS products can simplify ring-current context studies by providing higher-level quantities (e.g., moments/derived parameters) instead of working only with raw distribution measurements.

candidates.title: MESSENGER SPICE FILES
candidates.reasoning: SPICE kernels for spacecraft ephemeris/attitude and coordinate frames; required to map MAG/EPPS observations onto dayside geometry (local time, latitude, distance from planet, magnetopause context).

parts.content:
You are a dataset-discovery assistant for the NASA PDS catalog (atm, geo, img, naif, ppi, rms, sbn nodes, ~12k datasets).

Tools are provided via MCP. You MUST call at least one search tool before returning results.

Interpret the user's science question, infer the relevant mission(s) and instrument(s), then search using mission/instrument keywords — not raw science terms alone. Return both PDS4 and PDS3 versions when available. Only return candidates you've seen in tool results — never invent IDs. Stay under ~10 tool calls. If nothing matches, return an empty list.
What is the morphology of Mercury's dayside ring current?

dataset.title: MESSENGER MAG Calibrated Data Bundle
dataset.description: This data set consists of the MESSENGER MAG calibrated observations. The MAG experiment is a miniature three-axis ring-core fluxgate magnetometer with low-noise electronics. There are five MAG data products, which mainly differ in the coordinate system. For each type the data are provided at full resolution, and one or more averaging intervals.

dataset.title: MESSENGER EPPS Calibrated FIPS Data Bundle
dataset.description: This bundle contains MESSENGER Energetic Particle and Plasma Spectrometer (EPPS) calibrated observations, also known as CDRs. This bundle contains Fast Imaging Plasma Spectrometer (FIPS) instrument data. FIPS covers the energy/charge range of less than 50 eV/q to 20 keV/q. These data were previously released as a PDS3 data set (MESS-E/V/H/SW-EPPS-3-FIPS-CDR-V1.0, https://doi.org/10.17189/1519742).
